name: Pizza Monster
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread Boboli Pizza Sauce on the Boboli Italian Bread Shell.
2. Place Hormel Pre-Sliced Pepperoni on the sauce.
3. Sprinkle shredded mozzarella cheese over the pepperoni.
4. Arrange green pepper strips and mushrooms to create a monster face on top of the pizza.
5. Bake on an ungreased baking sheet at 450°F for 8-10 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown and the cheese is melted and bubbly.
